_meta.description: 8x8 symmetric audience overlap matrix between competitor archetypes and the user creator. Values 0.0-1.0 represent fraction of shared audience (Jaccard intersection fraction). Used by propose_collab to compute collab reward multipliers and by query_creator_pool to expose overlap to the agent. Same-niche pairs ~0.4-0.65, cross-niche ~0.05-0.20.
_meta.source: Competitor pairs estimated from Rival IQ 2025 cross-industry overlap patterns + niche proximity heuristic. user_creator row tuned to a generic micro-creator (no locked niche): broad mass-market partners (lifestyle_blogger, viral_chaser) score highest; specialist partners (b2b_thought_leader, niche_expert) score lowest.
_meta.mock_followers_note: Mocked follower counts span tiers from micro (10k user) to mid (250k viral_chaser). Used to derive intersection size via Jaccard inversion: |A intersect B| = overlap * (|A| + |B|) / (1 + overlap).
